node.statement: STEP: Define average state fidelity F = E_U[Tr[Λ_U(|0⟩⟨0|) U|0⟩⟨0|U†]]. Using the swap trick: F = ⟨⟨s|∏_i (N_i⊗1)E_{U_i}[(U_i⊗U_i*)^{⊗2}]|0,0⟩^{⊗2}. This is an Ising model with top BC = s (swap), bottom BC = |0,0⟩, and in-circuit noise on one replica only. [Eq.(15), main.tex line 246]
